## Collections.CacheInvalidatingResultMapWrapper.update() method

Updates an existing key in the map. Invalidates the cache entry for the key.

**Signature:**

```typescript
update(key: TK, value: TSRC): DetailedResult<TSRC, ResultMapResultDetail>;
```
